name: Snap Model Prep (Blender)
description: Fixes and prepares any 3D model for Snapchat Lens Studio using Blender (headless prep_for_lens.py or Blender MCP): origin/scale/orientation, per-part theme materials, separate parts, cleanup, export verified lens-ready GLB. Bridges Blender and the Snap Lens pipeline.
responsibilities: Fix origin to geometry + apply scale + normalize head size
Assign per-part clean materials with explicit theme colors (navy/gold)
Cleanup + optional decimate; export verified lens-ready GLB; record license
tasks: Run prep_for_lens.py headless OR drive via blender_001 (MCP)
Hand off to snap_005 -> Lens Studio (snap_007) + TasselSway

inputs.source_model: GLB/FBX + target look + part names + head size; per task

outputs.lens_ready_glb: clean verified GLB (origin/scale/colors/parts) + license note; per task
